who: HR coordinators in small to medium-sized companies using BambooHR
offer: For HR coordinators in small to medium-sized companies using BambooHR processing 5–15 new hires/month, inefficient manual onboarding causes delays in employee integration. We automate new hire paperwork instead of manual paperwork processing and verification.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for HR coordinators
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on workflows
DM outreach to HR coordinators with demo video
Share insights in HR community forums/groups
try_it: Let users try I-9 verification tracking and reminders
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
